rows.label: qev012103_MSG0002
rows.name:
Ehehe, I don't even know what to
say this time... I'm sorry for
constantly relying on you...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012103_MSG0003
rows.name:
The only reason I'm alive right
now is all thanks to you, Senpai.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012103_MSG0004
rows.name:
Even I'm reflecting on
my actions this time.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012103_MSG0005
rows.name:
I was painfully reminded once
again just how vast the world is.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012103_MSG0007
rows.name:
As I thought, trying to adventure
with just my bare flesh in this
civilized era was pushing it![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012103_MSG0008
rows.name:
That's right! If my equipment was better,
I wouldn't have been in such danger![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012103_MSG0009
rows.name:
Hmmm... Assuming there wasn't a problem
with me personally this time...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012103_MSG0010
rows.name:
For my next adventure, I need
slightly better equipment...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012103_MSG0011
rows.name: And for that, I need funding first...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012103_MSG0013
rows.name:
Papa and Mama said it too...
Sponsors are important...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012103_MSG0016
rows.name: Oh, huh!? You're still here, Senpai?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012103_MSG0017
rows.name:
I'm fine now, so don't worry about
me and please return to your work![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012103_MSG0018
rows.name:
The only thing I have confidence
in is the sturdiness of my body![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012103_MSG0019
rows.name: Thanks for checking up on me![ST:wait ]
